entries.title: OpenSSL: certificate validation vulnerability
entries.content:
Package: openssl
CVE: CVE-2026-30001
CVSS: 8.8
Affected versions: < 3.2.4
Fixed in 3.2.4
Flatcar ships this server package in the production Stable image.
Gentoo bug: https://bugs.gentoo.org/30001

entries.title: rust-openssl: new upstream CVE
entries.content:
Package: rust-openssl
CVE: CVE-2026-30002
CVSS: 7.8
Fixed in 0.10.79
Flatcar uses this package for relevant server components.
Gentoo bug: https://bugs.gentoo.org/30002

entries.title: Linux kernel: CVE-2026-30003
entries.content:
Package: linux-kernel
CVE: CVE-2026-30003
CVSS: 9.1
A Linux kernel vulnerability was fixed in a stable kernel release.

entries.title: GNOME Shell: desktop vulnerability
entries.content:
Package: gnome-shell
CVE: CVE-2026-30004
CVSS: 6.1
This is a GNOME desktop shell issue and no Flatcar production/sysext/SDK evidence is present.

entries.title: npm package left-pad-plus vulnerability
entries.content:
Package: left-pad-plus
CVE: CVE-2026-30005
CVSS: 7.5
This npm package is an application ecosystem package with no evidence that Flatcar ships or uses it.
